docs: * `admin` - Contract admin (can upgrade code, set pair code hash)
* `fee_to_setter` - Address that can change fee recipient
* `pair_code_hash` - Code hash of Pair contract (for instantiation)
constructors.label: new

docs: Get pair address for two tokens
messages.label: get_pair_address

docs: Address of the newly created pair
- Neither token can be zero address
messages.label: create_pair

docs: * `fee_to` - New fee recipient address (or None to disable fees)
messages.label: set_fee_to

docs: Propose a new fee setter address (fee_to_setter only, two-step)
The new setter must call `accept_fee_to_setter()` to complete the transfer.
messages.label: set_fee_to_setter

docs: Accept the fee setter role (pending setter only)
messages.label: accept_fee_to_setter

docs: Propose a new admin (admin only, two-step)
The new admin must call `accept_admin()` to complete the transfer.
messages.label: set_admin

docs: Accept the admin role (pending admin only)
messages.label: accept_admin

docs: Propose a new pair contract code hash (admin only, step 1)
messages.label: propose_pair_code_hash

docs: Execute a previously proposed pair code hash update (admin only, step 2)
messages.label: execute_pair_code_hash_update

docs: Propose a factory contract code upgrade (admin only, step 1)
messages.label: propose_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Execute a previously proposed factory upgrade after timelock (admin only, step 2)
messages.label: execute_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Cancel a pending upgrade proposal (admin only)
messages.label: cancel_pending_upgrades
